summary: A clip from a Fox News program with a station bug and on-screen clock. The screen shows an anchor at left, a guest at center, and an inset video at right. The guest, a man in a dark suit, speaks remotely; a lower-third names him 'STEPHEN MILLER, DEPUTY CHIEF OF STAFF FOR POLICY'. The inset shows naval imagery labeled 'STRAIT OF HORMUZ' and later 'U.S. CENTRAL COMMAND' with a fighter jet. Chyrons reference a blockade and Iran.

script.scene: Anchor, guest and an inset of a ship labeled 'STRAIT OF HORMUZ'; lower-third 'STEPHEN MILLER, DEPUTY CHIEF OF STAFF FOR POLICY'; chyron 'STRAIT IS OPEN, UNLESS YOU SAIL TO IRAN'.
The inset now shows a fighter jet labeled 'U.S. CENTRAL COMMAND'; chyron 'BLOCKADE PUTS THE SQUEEZE ON IRAN'.

notable_text: STEPHEN MILLER DEPUTY CHIEF OF STAFF FOR POLICY; STRAIT OF HORMUZ; U.S. CENTRAL COMMAND; BLOCKADE PUTS THE SQUEEZE ON IRAN
